Prepping the Account
The Framework
PREPPING THE CLIENT ACCOUNT
Here we start to get the client's website and assets ready for traffic and the campaign
set up phase.
Step #1: Check Privacy Policy installed & compliant with GDPR
Step #2: Check the client site for tracking
Step #3: Set up Offline Event tracking
Step #4: Set up reporting column
DON'T FORGET - there's a full step by step of this inside the SOP!
